summary: Phase 4 frontend componentization testing complete. All 6 department tabs render correctly with live WebSocket data. Column headers confirmed to be bold white (font-extrabold text-white) - not light grey #808080. App.js successfully refactored from 1,450 lines to ~110 lines with clean component separation.
passed_tests: Crypto Bots tab: BTC Bot and ETH Bot cards visible with live price data (BTC @ $69,088.60, ETH @ $2,134.20)
Crypto Data tab: Pipeline table shows 24 crypto engine rows with all columns
Crypto Markets tab: Open trades (0) and Recent trades (0) sections visible
Exchange Data tab: Pipeline table shows 24 exchange engine rows with Status column
Exchange Markets tab: Open/recent trades sections visible
The Brain tab: 10-step pipeline (MARKET DATA FEED through SELF-IMPROVEMENT + THE BIBLE) and Bible section
TopBar: W/L (57/75 43%), Kitty ($54.99), Today P&L ($1.33), All Time P&L (+$1.38), Open positions (2)
Trade size buttons: $10, $25, $50, $100, $150 all visible and functional
WebSocket: Green wifi icon (#22C55E) and '46 LIVE' data feed count displayed
Column headers: Verified bold white styling (font-extrabold text-white, computed color rgb(255,255,255), font-weight 800)
Tab switching: All 6 departments (bots, crypto_data, crypto_markets, exch_data, exch_markets, brain) switch correctly
Manual download button: Visible in TopBar with download icon
seed_data_creation: None - system uses live WebSocket data from backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 componentization complete. App.js reduced from 1,450 lines to ~110 lines. Components created: TopBar.jsx, BotCard.jsx (BotsView + BotCard), PipelineTable.jsx, MarketsView.jsx, BrainView.jsx, SymbolIcon.jsx. Helpers: formatters.js, constants.js. Hook: useWebSocket.js. All column headers use text-white font-extrabold classes. Dark mode gold/amber palette preserved. WebSocket endpoint: wss://trading-engine-hub-3.preview.emergentagent.com/api/ws/engines

crypto_bots_tab.description: BTC Bot and ETH Bot cards with live prices, win rates, P&L, thresholds, and live positions

crypto_data_tab.description: 24 crypto engine rows in pipeline table with all metrics (WPS, Price, Sd, Rgm, Vol, Fit/Cn/T, PF/Ac/H, Sg, Tier, Pos, SL/Tr/TP, Gen, W/L, P&L)

crypto_markets_tab.description: Open trades and recent trades sections for crypto engines

exchange_data_tab.description: 24 exchange engine rows with Status column showing OPEN/CLOSED market hours

exchange_markets_tab.description: Open/recent trades sections for exchange engines

brain_tab.description: 10-step pipeline with expandable details and The Bible section with entries/scored/helpful/help rate stats

websocket.description: Green wifi icon when connected, data feed count (46 LIVE)

column_headers.note: Changed from light grey #808080 to bold white as requested
